symbols.vision_description: A circle with four arrowheads distributed around its perimeter, all pointing in a counterclockwise direction, forming a cyclic/rotational symbol.
A hand-drawn circle containing two dots (eyes) and a smaller dot below (mouth), resembling a simple smiley face, with a partial lowercase 'd' shape to the right.
A circle containing three filled dots arranged as a simple face: two dots on top representing eyes and one dot below representing a mouth or nose.
A circular outline containing three solid dots arranged in a triangular pattern (one dot on top, two dots below), with a partial angular character or shape visible to the right.
A circular outline containing three filled dots arranged in a triangular pattern resembling a simple face (two upper dots as eyes, one lower dot as a mouth).
A circle containing three dots arranged in a triangular pattern (one dot on top, two dots below), flanked by two vertical line segments on the left and right sides.
A circle containing three small filled dots arranged in a triangular pattern, resembling a simple face with two eyes and a mouth.
Simple smiley face: a circle outline with two dot eyes and a curved mouth line below

A circle containing two dots (resembling eyes) and possibly a small mark below, flanked on the left by a Y-shaped stroke and on the right by an n-shaped stroke, together forming a face-like symbol within bracket-like arms.

A circular outline containing three small dots arranged in a triangular pattern (two dots at top like eyes, one dot at bottom like a mouth), with a partial square/rectangular shape to the right of the circle.
